title: Income Producing. Flexible Operating Models. National Brand. Turnkey.
reasonForSelling: Upcoming renewal + owner relocated out of state & operates 100% remotely.
supportTraining: Up to two weeks of seller support at buyer request. Depending on structure, 1:1 daily operations training can be provided by current technician. Franchisor also provides onboarding resources, operational systems, and ongoing franchisee support. This along with the organic appointment funnel ensures
description:
This is a rare opportunity to step into a profitable, nationally recognized service business with systems and brand support already in place. The protected area includes some of the most desirable zip codes in North Texas, with strong household incomes, median home values, desirability, in conjunction with record population growth. Territories in this region are rarely available and typically only become accessible through resale opportunities such as this.

The subject territory serves 26 protected zip codes spanning from North Dallas to Celina, with an established customer base and strong reputation. New and existing customer appointments are also generated through the brand’s national call center and online booking platform - allowing the business to secure jobs off hours, with consistent organic demand and minimal lead chasing. This structure allows appointments to appear directly on the calendar minus unwanted solicitation or follow up.

The current owner has successfully managed the business remotely since 2020, demonstrating the strength of the systems and processes in place (even from afar). Despite out of state oversight, the business has remained profitable while continuing to grow both residential and commercial relationships.

A reliable full-time technician has been with the company since inception in 2019 and is proficient with the equipment, service standards, territories, and customer relationships. This long tenure provides valuable operational continuity and can help minimize the learning curve for a new owner. The sale proposition has been discussed openly with care and transparency, to ensure a smooth handoff and stability for both employee and incoming owner. The tech is open to working under new ownership or exiting by request with notice.
